pairedcountbrms 0.6.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • The anatomy of a paired count
  • Changelog

Package index

Joint bivariate-count families

Model the matched pair jointly via trivariate reduction, capturing its correlation, marginal overdispersion, and difference together rather than the difference alone.

bipois() bipois_stanvars() log_lik_bipois() posterior_predict_bipois() posterior_epred_bipois()
Joint EM/logbook bivariate-Poisson custom family for brms
binegbin() binegbin_stanvars() log_lik_binegbin() posterior_predict_binegbin() posterior_epred_binegbin()
Joint EM/logbook bivariate-Negative-Binomial custom family for brms
binegbin_joint() binegbin_joint_stanvars() log_lik_binegbin_joint() posterior_predict_binegbin_joint()
Censoring-aware joint EM/logbook bivariate-Negative-Binomial family for brms

Difference families

Model the difference d = y_em - y_lb directly. The 1 variants fix the location at zero (do the two sources agree on average?); the 2 variants estimate it (by how much do they disagree?).

skellam1() skellam1_stanvars() log_lik_skellam1() posterior_predict_skellam1() posterior_epred_skellam1()
Symmetric Skellam custom family for brms
skellam2() skellam2_stanvars() log_lik_skellam2() posterior_predict_skellam2() posterior_epred_skellam2()
Asymmetric Skellam custom family for brms
dnorm1() dnorm1_stanvars() log_lik_dnorm1() posterior_predict_dnorm1() posterior_epred_dnorm1()
Discrete-normal custom family for brms (location 0, free scale)
dnorm2() dnorm2_stanvars() log_lik_dnorm2() posterior_predict_dnorm2() posterior_epred_dnorm2()
Discrete-normal custom family for brms (free location and scale)
dlaplace1() dlaplace1_stanvars() log_lik_dlaplace1() posterior_predict_dlaplace1() posterior_epred_dlaplace1()
Discrete-Laplace custom family for brms (location 0, free scale)
dlaplace2() dlaplace2_stanvars() log_lik_dlaplace2() posterior_predict_dlaplace2() posterior_epred_dlaplace2()
Discrete-Laplace custom family for brms (free location and scale)

Truncation support

Stan lccdf functions injected as stanvars so the difference families normalise correctly under resp_trunc().

skellam1_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-Skellam log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc()
skellam2_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-asymmetric-Skellam log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc()
dnorm1_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-discrete-normal log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc()
dnorm2_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-discrete-normal log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc() (free location and scale)
dlaplace1_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-discrete-Laplace log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc()
dlaplace2_lccdf_stanvars()
Truncated-discrete-Laplace log-CCDF for use with brms's resp_trunc() (free location and scale)

Parameterisation helpers

Convert between the dpars a family takes and more interpretable coordinates.

skellam2_dpars()
Report skellam2's derived quantities from a fitted model
binegbin_mfd_to_dpars()
Convert (M, f, delta) coordinates to native binegbin/bipois dpars
binegbin_dpars_to_mfd()
Convert native binegbin/bipois dpars to (M, f, delta) coordinates

On this page

Developed by Adam N. H. Smith.
